slots.name: The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time

surface_form: The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time was released by Nintendo EAD in 1998. It is an action-adventure, puzzle, role-playing game for Nintendo. You play from a bird view, in third person.
Dance Dance Revolution Universe 3 is a music game, and it was released for Xbox in 2008.
Payday 2 from 2013 is an RPG shooter with multiplayer.

The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim, released by Bethesda Game Studios in 2011, has been receiving positive ratings. This single-player adventure role-playing game was made for PlayStation, Xbox, Nintendo, and PC, and is available on Steam.
You said that you don't like Euro Truck Simulator. Is this the case for all games that lack multiplayer and Linux support?
The 2016 role-playing, third person shooter, tactical game, Tom Clancy's The Division, got average reviews.
